final_result.title: ZSTK3744, a Novel Aryl Hydrocarbon Receptor Agonist, Exhibits Efficacy against Chemotherapy-Resistant Triple-Negative Breast Cancer

cheap_result.title: Pancreatic cancer-associated organ dysfunction promotes muscle autophagy and contributes to peripheral tissue wasting

cheap_result.title: Imbalance in gut microbial interactions as a marker of health and disease

cheap_result.title: FACT depletion results in a temporal cascade of chromatin disruption preceding transcriptional collapse in stem cells
cheap_result.why: Maps the temporal sequence of chromatin perturbations following FACT depletion and subsequent transcriptional collapse, providing mechanistic insight into chromatin regulation relevant to stem cells and potentially cancer epigenetics.

final_result.title: FACT depletion results in a temporal cascade of chromatin disruption preceding transcriptional collapse in stem cells
final_result.why: Provides a high-resolution temporal map of chromatin and transcriptional changes after FACT depletion in murine embryonic stem cells. While mechanistically interesting, it is not cancer-focused in the title/summary and does not clearly align with translational oncology or single-cell/multi-omics integration priorities.

cheap_result.title: mSWI/SNF complex inhibition sensitizes KRAS-mutant lung cancers to targeted therapies via epithelial-mesenhymal subversion
cheap_result.why: Shows resistance-modulating effects of chromatin remodeling inhibition in a KRAS-mutant cancer context; translational relevance for combination therapy and resistance mechanisms.

final_result.title: mSWI/SNF complex inhibition sensitizes KRAS-mutant lung cancers to targeted therapies via epithelial-mesenchymal subversion
final_result.why: Mechanistic/translational resistance study identifying chromatin remodeling (mSWI/SNF) as a determinant of EMT-mediated targeted-therapy resistance and testing a clinical-grade inhibitor to dampen resistance. Cancer type differs, but EMT/cell-state plasticity framing is relevant to resistance programs broadly.

final_result.title: A first-in-human phase 1 study of the SHP2 inhibitor BBP-398 in patients with advanced solid tumors

cheap_result.title: Uncertainty-aware synthetic lethality prediction with pretrained foundation models
cheap_result.why: Two-stage, graph-free framework that leverages pretrained foundation models to predict synthetic lethality, with clear potential for targeted therapy strategies.

final_result.title: Uncertainty-aware synthetic lethality prediction with pretrained foundation models
final_result.why: Introduces a synthetic-lethality prediction framework leveraging pretrained biological foundation models with uncertainty awareness, relevant to prioritizing combination targets in cancer. The focus on generalization beyond curated PPI/GO can be useful for discovery in less-studied pediatric contexts.
